ground_truth.title: Personal and Group Training
ground_truth.main_content:
Work Out with a Professional

Get more from your workout with training programs from our certified personal trainers, wellness staff and life coaches. The Tampa Y wellness staff is ready to support each individual by being accountability partners, creating programs to help you achieve your goals and create and stick to healthy lifestyle habits.

Whether you need someone to guide you in a fitness routine, need to improve strength to master daily activities, need an accountability partner or thrive in a competitive environment, the Y has a training program for you. Learn more about our personal training programs at 13 Tampa Y locations.

Personal Training

Whether you need an accountability partner, new exercises or want to improve overall strength, the Tampa Y has a personal trainer for you. When you work with a personal trainer at the Y, you will:
- Establish goals that suit your fitness level
- Workout one-on-one time with a certified trainer

- Receive an exercise program specific to your needs, health status, and limitations
- Learn proper exercise techniques, program design, and progression to avoid exercise-related injuries
- Receive positive encouragement and accountability to keep you committed to your training program
- Receive an InBody scan for free

Purchase Personal Training by location.

Small Group Training

Work out with a friend or meet new people and accountability partners! Small group training is the best of personal training and group exercise, with fewer people and a certified personal trainer leading a specialized program. The group works toward similar goals focusing on strength, endurance and agility.

Benefits of Small Group Training
- New friends

- Workout with people with similar goals

- Led by certified personal trainer

Specialized small group training programs focus on a range of wellness goals and concentrations: specific fitness goals (cardio, strength, etc.), an apparatus and athletic training. Small group training is available at all Tampa Y locations.

Personal & Small Group Training Rates

Personal Training Rates

Personal Training is sold in single sessions. Personal Training Packages listed below are suggested quantities. To receive the package discount, click the Purchase button, sign in, add sessions to your Cart, which will reflect the final discounted rate.

One-on-One Personal Training rates for 60-minute sessions.

Purchase 60-Minute Sessions

One-on-One Personal Training rates for 45-minute sessions*. Available for YMCA Members only.

Purchase 45-Minute Sessions

One-on-one Personal Training rates for 30-minute sessions. Available for Tampa Y members only.

Purchase 30-Minute Sessions

Small Group Training Packages

Package session quantities vary by location. Each Small Group Training session is typically 60 minutes.

Purchase Group Training

Reach out to your center to learn more about Two Person Personal Training!

Trainers and Information by Location

Bob Sierra

Group Training Schedule Purchase Personal Training Purchase Group Training

Meet the Bob Sierra Y Trainers

Danielle Cooney, Personal Trainer
I am a strong and enthusiastic lifetime fitness advocate. After being diagnosed with Multiple Sclerosis in 2004, which initially caused partial paralysis, I was able to get my body back from the disease after conducting an arduous and aggressive months-long physical and occupational therapy program. Since then, I have made fitness and nutrition my passion by taking it to the next level and becoming a Personal Trainer. I am a dedicated fitness professional always striving to help others achieve their personal fitness goals that will ultimately lead to a healthy and rewarding life.
- Certifications
- Associates from Austin Peay State University in Applied Science

- Functional Training, TRX Suspension, Corrective Exercise

Jodi Frazier Fleeman, Personal Trainer
I have experience training a variety of fitness levels, from beginners to triathletes. Whether you are looking to lose weight, tone up, complete your first 5K, or make healthy lifestyle changes, I will give you the workouts, behavioral tools, and motivation to help you become the strongest, fittest, and most athletic version of yourself. My personal fitness mantra is: I will persist until I succeed, and I want that for you as well!
- Certifications

- CPR/AED/First Aid
- AFAA Certified Group Exercise Instructor

- Mad Dogg Certified SPINNING Instructor
- Les Mills Certified BODYPUMP Instructor
- Precision Nutrition Certificate in Exercise Nutrition
- LiveStrong at the YMCA Program Instructor

- Functional Training, Corrective Exercise, Running, Cycling, Triathlons

Holly Hostler, Personal Trainer
As a former professional modern dancer, I believe movement is integral to happiness. Fitness should help you experience everyday life to the fullest potential. On an Alaska cruise of over 2500 passengers, my family was three of six passengers that felt fit enough to climb to the top of Laughton Glacier. It is my hope as a trainer to help you discover challenging your body through a combination of strength, cardio, and core work leads to the ability to fully experience all that life has to offer. As a former professional dancer who lived and performed in New York City for six years, I feel passionately about helping my clients find that through movement we can age gracefully and participate fully in life.
- Certifications
- CPR/AED/First Aid

- Pilates Instructor

- Functional Training, TRX Suspension, Senior Health and Wellness

Scott Moseley, Personal Trainer
Move better, feel better, look better. I believe that we should always move with a purpose. Whether it is to lose weight, feel better or look good we all have the ability to enhance our own quality of life through fitness. The human body is an incredible machine that should be challenged to strive for progress, not perfection. I know that my journey through life will take me on different paths but one constant that has been, and will always be, fitness.
- Certifications

- CPR/AED/First Aid

- Functional Training, Corrective Exercise, TRX Suspension

Clay Otte, Personal Trainer
I believe that fitness and health should be a lifestyle. Whether it's weight loss, building muscle, or toning up, it should be a commitment and part of you all through your life. It's not just to look good, but to feel good and more confident in yourself. During my 11 years at the YMCA, I've seen awesome transformations in people of all age groups.
- Certifications

- CPR/AED/First Aid
- LiveStrong Coach

- All age groups, focus on senior health and wellness

Bruce Ayers
There are two things that determine the caliber of life one will live; Quality of life and Quantity of life, and it just so happens training out bodies improves both. Quality of life is how our physical abilities create more opportunities and ways to engage with the world, whether that be playing with our grandkids, rock climbing, ski trips, hiking or walking around amusement park, we need a certain level of fitness to accomplish these things. Then our quantity of life is how much time we actually get on this earth, which is enhanced by lowering our body fat and our resting heart rate. My mission is to help as many people as possible get the most out of their life by improving their strength, endurance, Flexibility and Nutrition to the highest levels possible.
- Certifications

- CPR/AED Certified
- Black Belt Tae Kwon Do
- Specialties

- Athletic Training

Kaylee Meyers
As a former collegiate athlete, fitness has always been a huge part of my life, and I've been incredibly blessed to build my career around it. I received a bachelor's degree in Exercise Science with the intent of primarily training athletes, but quickly fell in love with working with a variety of clientele. From novice individuals to athletic performance to pre/postnatal training, I've had the pleasure of working with many people at various stages of life. I believe that with a desire for change and some educational guidance, everyone is capable of becoming a better version of themselves.
- Certifications
- BS Sports Medicine - Exercise Science

- CPR/AED/First Aid
- Specialties
(all ages)

- Injury Prevention
- Pre/Postnatal
- Nutrition Coaching

MaryAnn Cook
I have a BS in Computer Science from St. John's University and an MBA from Baruch College, both in NYC. I moved to Tampa 30 years ago. I have been working out for over 30 years.
- Certifications

- CPR/AEO Certified
- Specialties
- Seniors

Matt Ortiz
I believe that fitness is about more than just appearance, it's about building strength, confidence, and resilience that carry into every part of life. With experience in personal training, outpatient physical therapy, and working alongside pediatric physical therapy teams, I enjoy helping people of all backgrounds move and feel better. My background in exercise science and exposure to advanced strength and conditioning methods, including work with elite performance specialists, have shaped my approach to training. I aim to create an encouraging environment where progress is the priority, and every client feels supported on their journey.

- BS in Exercise Science (in progress)

Caleb Cummings
Hello! I'm Caleb Cummings, a certified personal trainer at the Bob Sierra YMCA. I specialize in helping people of all ages-including youth, older adults and individuals with special needs-build confidence through safe, effective and sustainable workouts. Whether it's improving balance, increasing strength, preventing injuries or achieving performance goals, I make fitness approachable and adaptable for every stage of life. I am NASM Certified and currently continuing my education with advanced coursework. I am also CPR/AED Certified. My background as an athlete, combined with years of strength and powerlifting training, has given me a solid foundation in performance and conditioning that I adapt to each client's unique needs. My mission is to make every session focused, motivating, and impactful so clients leave feeling better, stronger and more capable.
- Certifications

- CPR/AED Certified
- Specialties
- Fitness for all ages (youth, adults, older adults)

- Fat loss and body composition
- Adaptive fitness for individuals with disabilities
- Injury prevention

Campo

Purchase Group and Personal Training

Meet the Campo Y Trainers

Brittany Bryant
As a personal trainer I have found my place in this world. I enjoy being that accountability, coach, and friend for each of my clients. I treat everyone as an individual because there isn't a "one size fits all" approach to living a healthy lifestyle. I believe that one deviation off the path does not mean all is lost and every small step to the top is a gain in the right direction. I have successfully trained a wide variety of clients all differing in fitness levels, age, medical conditions and goals. No matter where you are starting, I will be with you at the finish line.
Certifications
- American College of Sports Medicine (ACSM)

Training Specialties
Functional lifting, endurance-based cardio, programming for emotional well-being and longevity

Chase Houston
As a young man, I was very much into sports and being in good physical shape. Unfortunately, like most, once high school was over, work and life started to consume everything and I was not able to maintain.
With hard work, consistency, training, and dieting over the last five years I have made a complete transformation. Nutrition and health are a huge part of my life now. I love personal training and everything about it and I can't wait to work with each and every one of you to achieve our goals together one day at a time. Let's get up and move!
Certifications
ISSA Certified Personal Trainer, CPR & First Aid
Training Specialties
Strength training, body building, physical therapy, mobility work

Glenn Morris
I love helping others reach their goals in a simple and efficient way. As a personal trainer, I believe in staying up to date on the latest fitness and nutrition information in order to better serve the people that I train. I will create a plan for you that addresses your goals whether it's losing weight, building muscle or just overall well-being. I don't know of a better way to improve your present and future health than to exercise.
Certifications

- ISSA Specialist in Sports Nutrition
- ISSA Specialist in Strength and Conditioning

Training Specialties
Strength training, bodybuilding, self-defense training, youth and young adults

Kelly Surrency
I have been an active person my entire life, from youth sports, to college athletes and beyond. I've always had a passion for sports, particularly volleyball, and coached collegiately at various institutions across the country for nine years after graduation. When it was time for a career change, I knew staying in the fitness industry was the answer. As a mother of two, I realize more than ever how valuable time is, and I believe in catering fitness programs to meet every individual's needs. That is why I chose the YMCA. There are so many resources available to members and the family atmosphere makes the Y the perfect place to train clients and help them meet their goals.
Certifications

- Coaching Accreditation Program, Level 1/IMPACT certified/USA Volleyball A1 Coach
- TRX Qualified
- CPR/First Aid
Training Specialties
TRX, nutrition, stretching/Theragun, active older adults

Ajee Wells
Having played sports my whole life helped me develop my love for fitness, but it wasn't until I saw how the lifestyles of many impacted their lives that I decided to combined both Health and Fitness together to bring about awareness. With my education and experience I figured I could help people who felt limited by their genetic factors teaching that with physical activities and nutrition they can achieve optimal health. I want to help my clients feel better about their health and appearance.
Certifications

- Sports Nutrition and Program Design
- CPR/First Aid
Training Specialties
Sports conditioning and technique, special populations, corrective rehab.

Mike Wylie
Certifications:

Training Specialties:

Laura Miller
Education/ Certifications:
- Med Kinesiology and Health, University of Texas at Tyler

Specialties:

- TRX

John Spruill
I like to push my clients so they can see growth both physically and mentally by completing tasks they previously thought they wouldn't be able to. I understand people need to step outside of their comfort zones sometimes to get the most out of themselves.
Specialties:

- Strength Training
Certifications:
- Action Fitness Certified Personal Trainer
- CPR & First Aid

Casey Maloney
I'm 21 years old and originally got into fitness through my love of baseball. Over time, and training for the game that I love it turned into a true passion for health, strength, and helping others reach their own goals, I focus on a variety of weight loss, corrective exercises, sport-specific training, and strength training! I believe everybody is uniquely different, meaning all training plans should be personalized to your unique needs. Most importantly discipline always beats motivation, stay consistent!
Certifications:

Specialties:
- Weight Loss

Ken Huertas
I believe that fitness is a lifelong endeavor that anyone can improve their life through it. My career was in law enforcement with many years spent on a SWAT team. I served as trainer in various disciplines including defensive tactics and as a fitness advisor. Throughout my life I have strived to maintain fitness through weight training, cardio, and martial arts including competing in judo throughout my 40's. Now in my 60's I hope to aid others in reaching their fitness goals no matter their age or when they began their journey.
Education/ Certifications:

Specialties:
- Senior Wellness
- Functional Fitness
- Self Defense

Central City

Purchase Group Training Purchase Personal Training

Meet the Central City Trainers

Daniel Coleman
I'm a NASM certified Personal Trainer with a passion for not only fitness, but also helping clients build lasting habits for health & well-being. I believe that this starts with taking care of the body and the soul, and fitness can strengthen both.
The programs I design are personalized, with a mix of strength, functional & high intensity training to make each and every workout beneficial to achieving your fitness goals. No matter if you're a beginner or want to take your fitness to the next level, I'm here to aid, guide and push you to reach and surpass your goals.
- Certifications

Zo Wims
My fitness philosophy is built on discipline, strength, and consistency. I believe fitness is mind, body, and spirit working together. Movement heals, food is fuel, and longevity is the real goal. I train to be strong for life, not just for today, and I lead by living the lifestyle I coach.

- Nutrition

- Endurance Training
- Weight Loss

- Certifications

- ISSA Strength & Conditioning Certification

Mila Harvey
"Results are non-negotiable."

- Glute Building
- Body Composition
- HIIT

- Accountability

- Certifications

- Certified Strength & Conditioning Instructor

Tre Harris
Welcome to the YMCA! My name is Tre, I believe staying in shape and hitting personal fitness goals is a very important aspect in one's life. I am a believer, so taking care of the mind, body, and spirit is key to peace and health. Honoring the body by taking great care of your temple comes great reward not only from physical results, but rewards from above beyond the physical. It's amazing reaching new heights with someone who cares about your progress and wants to be there and help you through your fitness journey! There is nothing better to me than seeing people happy with their fitness results, allow me to watch and help you achieve yours!
- Certifications

Kimberly David
Fitness is more than just exercise, it's a journey toward a healthier, more vibrant life and the building of stronger, more connected communities. As a trainer, I will inspire, motivate, and empower you every step of the way.
My approach combines strength, functional movement, and endurance, while prioritizing prevention, balance, and daily practices that support long-term vitality. Together, we'll design a program that goes beyond workouts, cultivating habits that nurture your mind, body, and spirit, and empowering you to reach your goals and embrace life to its fullest.
- Certifications
- Master of Public Health - Leadership

- ACE Strength & Conditioning Coach

Mike Muniz
It's never too early or late to take the first steps toward better quality of life. Together we can create and implement a plan to ensure we excel beyond your goals through the appropriate combination of training styles, specifically set to fit your needs.

- Certifications
- University of Cincinnati - BS Exercise Science
- InBody Certified - Experience Manager

- ACE Strength & Conditioning Coach

- SilverSneakers Certified - Circuit, Classic, & Yoga
- YUSA YWeight Coach, Livestrong at the YMCA Cancer Survivor Coach, Parkinson's Cycling Coach

Dade City & East Pasco

Purchase Group Training Purchase Personal Training

Meet the Dade City & East Pasco Y Trainers

Brianna Cimino
Over the last three years of Brianna's fitness journey, physical fitness has brought her a sense of mental ease. She has a drive each and everyday to become better than she was yesterday and strives to help others do the same. Brianna specializes in training our Active Older Adult population with a focus on helping them become more active, energized, and empowered to sustain healthy independent lives. "Do something today that your future self will thank you for."
Certifications

Training Specialties
Functional Training, Focus on Active Older Adults; Overall Fitness

Ahkil McGill
Fitness has always been a pivotal part of my life. Maintaining the physical shape to perform in athletics and my passion for helping others drove me into this field. Having an opportunity to design a program to assist others in reaching their own specific personal health and fitness goals is something near and dear to my heart. Nothing can compare to the satisfaction of building a strong relationship with my clients and watching them get stronger, healthier, and more confident as they reach their goals. This is why I do what I do!
Certifications
- Bachelors Degree in Health Science

Kasey Stroede
Fitness Philosophy: Train for life! Fitness is more than looking good, its about feeling good on the inside, too. Stay active! Stay strong! "Push yourself because no one else is going to do it for you."
Certifications

Training Specialties
Functional training, focus on Active Older Adults, strength and mobility training

Downtown

Purchase Group Training Purchase Personal Training

Meet the Downtown Y Trainers

Ashleigh Anderson
I'm Coach Ashleigh, and I love lifting! My training style is that of a Power-Builder. I enjoy heavy lifts, but I like switching it up with intense HIIT-style training every once in a while. I also have a passion for recovery and mobility, so that you can stay injury-free. Let's get a session together!
Certifications

Specialities:
- Strength Training

- Athletic Recovery

Jarrett Dutton
Hello! My name is Jarrett Dutton and I am a doctoral physical therapy student, certified strength and conditioning specialist, and former collegiate athlete. I love lifting weights, running, and nutrition
Specialities:
- Strength Training
- Hyperthrophy
- Sports Performance
- Overall Wellness

Mila Harvey
As someone who's dealt with being overweight for most of my life, I understand firsthand how tough it can be to make the lifestyle changes needed to get in shape. After losing over 50 pounds, I've been through the ups and downs of the weight loss journey. I now dedicate my career to helping my clients tackle the mental hurdles around diet and exercise so they can achieve lasting results. If you're ready to level up your fitness, let's book a session together!

New Tampa

Purchase Group Training Purchase Personal Training

Meet the New Tampa Y Trainers

Shelie Bollenbach, Health Coach
I have over 20 years of personal training experience, working with a diverse range of functional ability, health & wellness goals and training options. Throughout my time as a trainer, I have expanded my ability to offer my clients a holistic approach to health & wellness by obtaining the ACE Health Coach certification, and Specialist Certification in Orthopedic Exercise. Fitness has many definitions, based on individual goals and ability. It is my joy to help you determine and achieve your fitness goals in a safe and effective, yet challenging program.
Certifications

- ACE Health Coach

- YOGAFIT Instructor
Hobbies
I love dragons and elephants! You can find them all over my house, office, clothes & car! I'm also a big kinesiology nerd - how the human body is designed for movement is so cool!

Debbie Keegan, Master Life Coach
Whether it is a goal that you are aiming for, a new habit you want to instill, or something you need to let go of - Debbie is the one you want. She is a master at using various tools and techniques that can help you reframe your thoughts, modify your behavior, and live a life you never thought possible. With three certifications under her belt, Debbie can help you sort through whatever's holding you back and transform your life for the better. Debbie is known for her exceptional communication skills that allow her to connect with clients on a deeper level, producing accelerated results. Her areas of expertise include parenting coaching, weight loss coaching, marriage coaching, blended families coaching, and motivational speaking. Debbie also teaches seminars. She is hardworking, driven, and extremely passionate about what she does. She believes in empowering and inspiring the people she works with. Having spent 10 years as a coach and a mentor, Debbie has helped hundreds of people overcome their struggles and become the best version of themselves. Debbie enjoys reading and tries to do something that pushes her out of her comfort zone every day. A big believer in practicing what you preach, Debbie is a rare life coach who is completely authentic in her approach. She lives her life in a way that reflects who she is, what she is about, and what she stands for.
Certifications
- Master Life Coach
Hobbies/Fun Facts
Debbie also volunteers weekly at A Woman's Place, an organization that conducts free pregnancy tests and sonograms and promotes women's health. She is a mother of four and loves spending her free time with her family, in particular, her grandchildren.

Stephan Leite
I started lifting weights when I was 13 years old, and it has been a hobby and habit I have carried into my adult life. When I had a year left in the Army, I decided to earn my Certified Personal Trainer credential from NASM. I currently do individual and small group training; I hope to teach and train people the fundamentals while training with weights and much more.
Certifications
- NASM - Certified Personal Trainer
Fun Facts
In the Army, I served as a 35G (Imagery analyst), and upon my transition, I earned an Army Commendation Medal (ARCOM). I also have an old Chihuahua and a cat named Potato.

Stefanie Rey, Health Coach
I have been a certified health and wellness specialist for over a decade, with a bachelor degree in biological health science and several specialty certifications, including a medical exercise specialist and a health coaching certification. I am passionate about a non-medical, holistic approach to a healthy spirit, mind, and body to achieve optimum health. I create programs that keep your goals at the core. Achieving mile markers in your journey will empower you to have more confidence, and feel better, be stronger, be you. I am so glad to be part of that journey.
Certifications

- ACE Health Coach

Hobbies
I grew up on a farm in Germany, I ride a motorcycle, and I am training for the Ironman 2021.

Erin Tate
I have always been passionate about sports. My interest in fitness was due to diabetes/hypertension, obesity and food addiction prevalent in my family. I also believe that exercise is nature's best anti-depressant. My journey began first with being that cardio "bunny," to becoming certified in Les Mills BodyPump, to stepping on stage and competing in fitness shows, while getting my personal training certification with NASM. I've been in this ever-changing fitness world over 10 years and continue to want to better myself through knowledge and education. Mostly recently, I obtained a certification specializing in "Behavioral Change." We all struggle to get to the gym or make a workout, I'm here to help you understand it takes: behavior change (cognitive), nutrition and fitness to maintain and create a long lasting lifestyle change. Let me coach and train you, evolve you into the best version of YOU! It's about progress, not perfection.
Certifications

- NASM Behavior Change Specialist
- NASM Group Personal Trainer Specialist

Fun Fact:
I was an inspiration for a (fictional) board game character.

Emily Watson
Fitness has been a part of my life for almost 20 years. Because I saw the results and benefited so much, both physically mentally, from exercising and learning how to take care of myself I decided to get a certification so that I could teach others. I am always learning and trying to stay with the latest exercise and fitness. I enjoy one-on-one training as well as small group training and boot camp classes. I believe it's never too late to get into fitness or to start your journey again after a break. I truly enjoy training people, teaching others and helping them on their journey to wellness and being their personal best!
Certifications

Hobbies
I'm from Tennessee, I love The Beatles, I've run the Disney race for 10 years straight and love to ride my bike. I love daises, so much that I have a tattoo of one!

Bill Pauline
It is my honor and passion to be on the frontline of the battle against these debilitating conditions by assisting individuals in improving their fitness for life-long health. We will accomplish this through setting realistic, attainable goals, developing an individualized program of fitness based on current best practices, and through a caring support system that includes the provision of evidence-based information, accountability, and positive encouragement/feedback. I look forward to working with you on your road to wellness.
I have competed and coached competitive baseball, softball, soccer and volleyball throughout my years. I also hold a Florida Class E soccer coaching license.
Certifications

- NASM Certified Nutrition Coach

Specialties
Weight loss, senior fitness, strength & conditioning, youth sports

Valerie Wolfe
I was inspired to become a personal trainer while working in childcare at the Y in 2012. Other moms would frequently ask me for fitness advice and I wanted to build a career on teaching people everything I had worked so hard to learn myself in regards to health & fitness. I became certified through ACSM and began training in October 2013. Since then, I have become very passionate about helping people develop their strength and stamina through weightlifting and obstacle course races. I do not believe in excuses. I will train anyone who has the desire to overcome their weaknesses and test their limits. I've worked with elderly, injured, overweight and otherwise challenged individuals and I fully believe that your mind is the main thing that truly gets stronger on this journey. Seeing my clients learn to trust their bodies and become mentally empowered is the greatest reward of being a personal trainer!
Certifications

Hobbies/Fun Facts
I grew up on a tomato farm. I'm learning Spanish. I hold all the RAW United Powerlifting records for the 132lb Masters class.
